task: Find the most popular blue Lilo & Stitch toys.
graderReasoning: The agent navigated from Disney.com to Disney Store, searched for “blue Lilo Stitch toys,” and reached the Disney Store search results page showing 6 products. The trajectory includes evidence that the results were sorted by “Most Popular” via the sort control and DOM extraction showing selectedText: “Most Popular” with srule=most-popular. The final answer lists the toy items visible in those results and correctly excludes the two canvas artwork entries as non-toys. Product names, prices, ratings, and URLs are backed by the page snapshots and DOM extraction.
final_result_response:
I found the Disney Store results for **“blue Lilo Stitch toys”**, sorted by **Most Popular**. The top toy matches are:

1. **[Stitch Plush – Lilo & Stitch – Medium 15 3/4'' – Personalized](https://www.disneystore.com/stitch-plush-lilo-stitch-medium-15-34-personalized-412312274183.html?isProductSearch=1&searchType=regular)**  
   $29.99, rated 4.8/5 from 85 reviews

2. **[Stitch Plush – Lilo & Stitch – Mini Bean Bag – 6''](https://www.disneystore.com/stitch-plush-lilo-stitch-mini-bean-bag-6-415171849141.html?isProductSearch=1&searchType=regular)**  
   $14.99, rated 4.6/5 from 5 reviews

3. **[Stitch Puppetronic by RealFX – Lilo & Stitch Live Action Film](https://www.disneystore.com/stitch-puppetronic-by-realfx-lilo-stitch-live-action-film-418149092600.html?isProductSearch=1&searchType=regular)**  
   $99.99, rated 3.5/5 from 2 reviews

4. **[Stitch as Elvis Fluffy Figurine by Grand Jester Studios – Lilo & Stitch](https://www.disneystore.com/stitch-as-elvis-fluffy-figurine-by-grand-jester-studios-lilo-stitch-028399440115.html?isProductSearch=1&searchType=regular)**  
   $54.99

I skipped the canvas artwork results because they’re not toys.
action_history: Opening Disney.com: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.disney.com/');
Opening Disney Store from Shop link: await page.locator('e14').click();
Searching Disney Store for Lilo Stitch toys: await page.locator('e23').click();
Dismissing popup and opening search: await page.locator('f16e1').click();
Submitting search query: await page.locator('e209').fill('blue Lilo Stitch toys');
Opening product type filter: await page.keyboard.press('Escape');
Opening product type filter: await page.locator('e28').click();
Inspecting product type filters: await page.locator('e28').click();
Confirming most popular sort: await page.locator('e25').click();
Closing dropdowns and refreshing product results: await page.keyboard.press('Escape');
Closing filter dropdown and refreshing snapshot: await page.locator('e28').click();
Reloading blue Lilo & Stitch toy results: await page.keyboard.press('Escape');
